name: Slow Cook Sweet & Sour Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. In the slow cooker, mix the cubed pork with cornstarch.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (soy sauce, vinegar, onion, tomato, ginger, brown sugar) except for the green pepper and tomatoes.
3. Cook on low heat setting for 8 hours.
4. Stir in the green peppers and tomatoes.
5. Cook on high heat setting for an additional 10 minutes.
